description: Pure-Rust Android decompiler and security-audit suite. DEX → Java, Hermes → JavaScript. Cross-layer taint across the React Native bridge. CycloneDX SBOM + OpenVEX. CLI and MCP. Bytecode is not a security layer.
commit_message:
docs: from-source build recipe (CLAUDE.md) + --fail-on CI gate in playbook

CLAUDE.md gains a build-from-checkout subsection: the [patch.crates-io]
sibling layout means a bare clone fails with a path-dependency error, so
an AI driver pointed at a checkout must clone all six repos as siblings
rather than fall back to cargo install. The README app-developer playbook
now gates CI with audit --fail-on=high instead of the jq length==0
workaround the flag replaced.
